values.description: Base URL of the running API server. Change to https://... for staging.

The application name as set by APP_NAME in .env. Used to build Gmail subject filters that match the emails sent by the mailer (e.g. 'Your {app_name} email change request'). Must match APP_NAME exactly (case-sensitive, no surrounding quotes).

The Gmail address that receives SMTP verification emails from the test server. Must match SMTP_USERNAME in .env. Used by the verify-email setup folder to register the test account so the OTP actually lands in the inbox.

OAuth 2.0 access token for the Gmail API. Used by the verify-email setup folder to fetch the OTP from the inbox. Generate at https://developers.google.com/oauthplayground — scope: https://www.googleapis.com/auth/gmail.readonly. Expires after 1 hour; re-generate before each run. Never commit a real token.
